message:
test: add 36 unit tests for markdown/templates/mail_ui + close Track 1 (br-33ha.2.9, br-33ha.2)

markdown.rs: 0→20 tests (rendering, sanitization, XSS prevention, tags).
templates.rs: 0→16 tests (striptags, truncate, tojson HTML escaping, env init).
mail_ui.rs: 3→19 tests (extract_query_str/int, truncate_body, ts_display).

Track 1 (br-33ha.2) now fully closed: all 8 child beads complete.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
